title: Jack Dorsey made an open-source Slack for humans and agents.
summary: Block’s new open-source app “ Buzz ” is a self-hosted Slack-meets-GitHub built on a Nostr relay. I don’t have enough characters to explain what that all means, but think of it like a private Slack alternative.
